evidence: "Being a horror enthusiast, I try to watch them all when I can."
"The story made no sense & moved at a snail's pace."
"The story drug on & was soooo boring."
"I kept getting distracted during the 1st 45 minutes because it was so slow."
"The quality is pretty bad. Audio is muffled at times & video quality goes from grainy to blurry."
"Acting & atmosphere were good, but the story drug on & was soooo boring."
"Great acting. Unique plot. I always love a good twist at the end & Orphan doesn't disappoint!"
"Great movie, but the quality is pretty bad."
"the good acting & horrifying visuals, the 'not knowing' makes it scarier."

summary: The user has a strong preference for horror films, often enjoying the visual spectacle and gore. However, they tend to dislike slow pacing and complex narratives, indicating a preference for straightforward storytelling. Their sensitivity to production quality is low, focusing more on the entertainment value than the polish of the films.
